query:
CREATE TABLE `breathing_exercises` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`exerciseType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`duration` int NOT NULL,
	`relaxationLevel` int,
	`notes` text,
	`completedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `breathing_exercises_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `chat_messages` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`role` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `chat_messages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `journal_entries` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`tags` text,
	`privacy` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'private',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `journal_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `mood_entries` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`mood` int NOT NULL,
	`emotionTags` text,
	`notes` text,
	`energyLevel` int,
	`stressLevel` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `mood_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text,
	`isRead` int DEFAULT 0,
	`scheduledAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `user_preferences` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`moodReminderTime` varchar(5) DEFAULT '09:00',
	`journalReminderTime` varchar(5) DEFAULT '20:00',
	`notificationsEnabled` int DEFAULT 1,
	`theme` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'light',
	`language` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'fr',
	`bio` text,
	`avatarUrl` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `user_preferences_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `user_preferences_userId_unique` UNIQUE(`userId`)
);

ALTER TABLE `breathing_exercises` ADD CONSTRAINT `breathing_exercises_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `chat_messages` ADD CONSTRAINT `chat_messages_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `journal_entries` ADD CONSTRAINT `journal_entries_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `mood_entries` ADD CONSTRAINT `mood_entries_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `notifications` ADD CONSTRAINT `notifications_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `user_preferences` ADD CONSTRAINT `user_preferences_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
